title: Irreversible
tmdbOverview: A woman’s lover and her ex-boyfriend take justice into their own hands after she becomes the victim of a rapist. Because some acts can’t be undone. Because man is an animal. Because the desire for vengeance is a natural impulse. Because most crimes remain unpunished.
synopsis: Irreversible (2002) is a drama, thriller and crime film from France. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a +18 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
